dimensions.label: Schwartz Self-Direction
dimensions.description: Schwartz basic value construct: independent thought and action.

dimensions.label: Schwartz Stimulation
dimensions.description: Schwartz basic value construct: excitement, novelty, and challenge.

dimensions.label: Schwartz Hedonism
dimensions.description: Schwartz basic value construct: pleasure and sensuous gratification.

dimensions.label: Schwartz Achievement
dimensions.description: Schwartz basic value construct: personal success through demonstrated competence.

dimensions.label: Schwartz Power
dimensions.description: Schwartz basic value construct: social status, prestige, and control over resources or people.

dimensions.label: Schwartz Security
dimensions.description: Schwartz basic value construct: safety, harmony, and stability.

dimensions.label: Schwartz Conformity
dimensions.description: Schwartz basic value construct: restraint of actions likely to upset others or violate expectations.

dimensions.label: Schwartz Tradition
dimensions.description: Schwartz basic value construct: respect and commitment to cultural, religious, or family customs.

dimensions.label: Schwartz Benevolence
dimensions.description: Schwartz basic value construct: preserving and enhancing the welfare of close others.

dimensions.label: Schwartz Universalism
dimensions.description: Schwartz basic value construct: understanding, tolerance, and protection for all people and nature.

dimensions.label: SDT Autonomy Need
dimensions.description: Self-Determination Theory basic psychological need: autonomy.

dimensions.label: SDT Competence Need
dimensions.description: Self-Determination Theory basic psychological need: competence.

dimensions.label: SDT Relatedness Need
dimensions.description: Self-Determination Theory basic psychological need: relatedness.

dimensions.label: Need for Cognition
dimensions.description: Preference for engaging in and enjoying effortful thinking.
